name.context: a tall office building in Nanning city with a vertical courtyard system

other systems, like lighting (Wan et al., 2012).
With an intention to promote industrial construction and vari-
able layout plan, a tall ofﬁce building in Nanning city has vertical
courtyard system with different layouts, as seen in Fig. 2. The three
typical ofﬁce layouts are selected to compare the thermal perfor-
mance and thermal energy consumption between traditional ones
(ofﬁce þ single courtyard) and fusion one (ofﬁce þ multi-court-
yards), ranging from linear (1st ﬂoor), integrated (3rd ﬂoor) to
fusion one (7th ﬂoor) as shown in Fig. 3.
